title: astronia alata
intro: Astronia alata, also known as Astronia or Tongkat Ali, is a type of plant that belongs to the Astronia genus. Traditionally, Astronia alata has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Astronia alata include improving testosterone levels, enhancing energy and endurance, and supporting immune function. Astronia alata is commonly prepared in herbal form, often taken in capsule or extract form, and can also be consumed as a tea or added to soups and stews.
